title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
The IDBI Bank Aspire Platinum Credit Card is for those who aspire for more rewards and convenience in every walk of life. This card is specially designed to provide you best-in-class privileges in traveling, dining, lifestyle and to meet your other aspirational needs. This card brings you unparalleled discounts and offers to suit your lifestyle and preferences both in India and abroad. 
IDBI Bank Aspire Platinum Credit Card is currently being offered with no joining fees, so hurry up! Call our Customer Care at 1800-209-4324 (Toll Free) or 022-67719100 (Call Charges Applicable) or visit the nearest branch. 
The digitised Credit Card Welcome e-Kit is IDBI Bank’s constant endeavor towards the Go Green initiative. This e-Kit provides the cardholder with detailed information regarding Card Usage, Cardholders Agreement and Most Important Terms & Conditions (MITC), in a downloadable PDF format. 
The IDBI Bank Aspire Platinum Card understands your lifestyle and rewards you for your needs. You will earn 2 Delight Points for every 150 spent by you using your Aspire Platinum Card; so enjoy on travelling, shopping, dining-out or watching movies, get rewarded for all your spends. Additionally, enjoy bonus delight points as following:
  * 500 bonus delight points on first transaction of Rs. 1,500 or more within 30 days of card activation.
  * Additional milestone benefit of 1,000 points on net annual spends of Rs. 1 lakhs.
  * Additional milestone benefit of 1,500 points on net annual spends of Rs. 2 lakhs.


***Delight points would be accrued only on transactions except the ones exempted from delight points accrual. Refer the exempted transaction categories**
Enjoy interest free credit of up to 48 days* on your purchases and manage your payments as per your convenience. You can choose to pay the total outstanding amount, minimum amount due or any other amount higher than the minimum amount due. 
Waiver of 1%* fuel surcharge every time you fill fuel using IDBI Bank Aspire Platinum Card across all fuel stations for transactions in the range of 400 to 4000. So keep driving and enjoying with friends and family. 
Get more freedom with your Aspire Credit Card. You can use it at over 9 lakh merchants in India and over 29 million merchants abroad. 
In case of loss of credit card, report it immediately at our 24-Hour Customer Care 1800-209-4324 (Toll free) / 022-67719100 (Non-toll free). The card will be immediately blocked for all transactions to prevent card misuse. Any fraudulent transaction after reporting the loss will be covered by the Bank. 
Make IDBI Bank your family Bank by gifting your family (only for members above 18 years) an add-on Aspire Platinum Credit Card. The add-on card enables your family members to avail all the benefits and features applicable on the primary card. The Delight Points earned on the add-on cards will be clubbed with those of the primary card and can be redeemed as per the higher eligibility. 
Customers will be eligible for exclusive offers on airport shopping, hotel,car rentals etc. which are provided for VISA Platinum cardholde Customers can enjoy travel concierge services provided by VISA for their travel related services. These offers are provided by VISA and may change as per VISA’s discretion from time to time without any prior notice For more details please

| Minimum Amount: Rs. 3000/- Interest Rate: 13% per Annum Processing and Foreclosure Fees: Nil EMI Tenure Options: 3, 6, 9 or 12 month  |  
| Minimum Amount: Rs. 3000/- Processing Fee: 1.5% of BT amount or Rs. 199/- whichever is higher, Normal Interest rate for EMI will apply.  |  
  * Primary card holder should be in the age bracket of 21 years to 60 years (65 years for self-employed).

The above eligibility criteria are only indicative. The Bank reserves the right to approve or decline applications for Credit Card.
  * ID Proof : Voter ID/ Passport/ Driving License/ PAN card/ Adhaar Card
  * Residence Proof : Electricity/ Telephone Bill/ Election Card/ Passport/ Adhaar Card
  * Income Proof : Latest 3 months’ Salary Slip/ Latest 3 months Bank Statement/ Income Tax Returns (ITR)/Form 16 

The above list is only indicative and documents required may vary on a case to case basis.
Get a Aspire Platinum Credit Card in 3 easy steps.
Call on our Phone Banking numbers - Toll Free - Non Toll Free - (24x7 service)
